title: How to Apply for an MIA Licence
alt: Six-step process for applying for an MHRA MIA licence

items.label: Define your scope
items.desc: Fix activities, dosage forms, site address and named roles.

items.label: Submit the application
items.desc: Apply via the MHRA Process Licensing Portal with your SMF.

items.label: Prepare for inspection
items.desc: Run a mock inspection or gap assessment against EU GMP.

items.label: Host the inspection
items.desc: Inspector reviews facility, systems, records and QP setup.

items.label: Resolve findings
items.desc: Respond with a robust, root-cause-based CAPA plan.

items.label: Receive authorisation
items.desc: MHRA issues the MIA listing activities, products and QP.
